mapper.select: SELECT c.*, t.name as teacherName FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 1
SELECT c.*, t.name as teacherName FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.status = 1
SELECT c.*, t.name as teacherName FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND c.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, teacher_id, credit, capacity, schedule, location, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{teacherId}, #{credit}, #{capacity}, #{schedule}, #{location}, #{description}, 1)
